label: Caprellidae
def: Family of amphipod crustaceans with elongated slender bodies, typically clinging to algae or hydroids and moving in an inchworm fashion.

label: Phyllaplysia taylori
common: Taylor's sea hare, Eelgrass sea hare, zebra leafslug

label: Ptilosarcus gurneyi
common: Gurney's sea pen, Orange sea pen, Fleshy sea pen
